Content: # Metronome > [!IMPORTANT] > This app is superseded by [https://codeberg.org/thetwom/metronome](https://codeberg.org/thetwom/metronome) Simple metronome app. [](https://f-droid.org/packages/de.moekadu.metronome/) [](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=de.moekadu.metronome) | ![screenshot-0](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/00.png) | ![screenshot-1](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/01.png) | ![screenshot-2](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/02.png) | ![screenshot-3](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/03.png) | ![screenshot-4](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/04.png) | |-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| # Functionality This app provides basic functionality like: * Setting speed manually or by "tap in" * If you use "tap in" while the metronome is running, the klicks should lock in to your taps. * Choose different sounds and individually adapt the volume * Save and load your current settings * Choose between light and dark theme * Show a notification, which supports "start" and "stop" # Help me improving the app If you like this app, but have ideas for improvement or are annoyed by some behaviour, please let me know. **License:** [GPLv3](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0)
Translation: # Métronome > [!IMPORTANT] > Cette application est remplacée par [https://codeberg.org/thetwom/metronome](https://codeberg.org/thetwom/metronome) Application de métronome simple. [](https://f-droid.org/packages/de.moekadu.metronome/) [](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=de.moekadu.metronome) | ![screenshot-0](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/00.png) | ![screenshot-1](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/01.png) | ![screenshot-2](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/02.png) | ![screenshot-3](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/03.png) | ![screenshot-4](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/04.png) | |-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| # Fonctionnalités Cette application offre des fonctionnalités de base telles que : * Réglage de la vitesse manuellement ou par "tapotement" * Si vous utilisez le "tapotement" pendant que le métronome fonctionne, les clics devraient se synchroniser avec vos tapotements. * Choisir différents sons et adapter individuellement le volume * Sauvegarder et charger vos réglages actuels * Choisir entre thème clair et sombre * Afficher une notification, qui supporte "démarrer" et "arrêter" # Aidez-moi à améliorer l’application Si vous aimez cette application, mais avez des idées d’amélioration ou êtes gêné par certains comportements, merci de me le faire savoir. **Licence :** [GPLv3](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0)

RowTranslations.originContent: This app provides basic functionality like:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: Cette application offre des fonctionnalités de base telles que :

RowTranslations.originContent: * Setting speed manually or by "tap in"
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * Réglage de la vitesse manuellement ou par "tapotement"

RowTranslations.originContent: * If you use "tap in" while the metronome is running, the klicks should lock in to your taps.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * Si vous utilisez le "tapotement" pendant que le métronome fonctionne, les clics devraient se synchroniser avec vos tapotements.

RowTranslations.originContent: * Choose different sounds and individually adapt the volume
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * Choisir différents sons et adapter individuellement le volume

RowTranslations.originContent: * Save and load your current settings
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * Sauvegarder et charger vos réglages actuels

RowTranslations.originContent: * Choose between light and dark theme
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * Choisir entre thème clair et sombre

RowTranslations.originContent: * Show a notification, which supports "start" and "stop"
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * Afficher une notification, qui supporte "démarrer" et "arrêter"

RowTranslations.originContent: If you like this app, but have ideas for improvement or are annoyed by some behaviour, please let me know.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: Si vous aimez cette application, mais avez des idées d’amélioration ou êtes gêné par certains comportements, merci de me le faire savoir.
